summary: Ternary operator evaluates `val1 if condition else val2`. Both `if` and `else` are mandatory.
oneLineSummary: Ternary expression: `X if condition else Y` computes inline values in one line.

memoryTricks.trick: Read as English: 'GIVE ME THIS if THIS IS TRUE else GIVE ME THAT'.

preInterviewChecklist: Explain Python ternary syntax vs C-style
